name: orq
description: Agent skills for building, deploying, evaluating, and monitoring LLM pipelines on the orq.ai platform.

interface.shortDescription: Build, evaluate, and monitor LLM pipelines on orq.ai
interface.longDescription: Agent skills for the full Build → Evaluate → Optimize lifecycle of LLM pipelines. Includes skills for building agents, running experiments, generating datasets, creating evaluators, analyzing traces, and optimizing prompts — plus the orq.ai MCP server for workspace access.
